prompt.prompt: See prompt.md — paste your customized prompt here

agent.first_message: Thanks for calling [Company]. How can I help you today?

tools.name: lookup_ticket
tools.description: Look up an existing support ticket by ticket number or customer email. Returns ticket status, history, and associated details.

ticket_number.description: The ticket or case number provided by the customer

customer_email.description: The customer's email address for account lookup

tools.name: escalate_to_human
tools.description: Transfer the call to a human support agent. Use when the issue cannot be resolved, the customer requests a manager, or the situation requires human judgment.

transfer.message: I'm transferring you to a specialist who can help further. Please hold for just a moment.

tools.name: end_call
tools.description: End the call after the issue is resolved or the customer confirms they have no further questions.

evaluation_criteria.name: Issue Identified
evaluation_criteria.description: The agent clearly identified and confirmed the customer's issue before attempting resolution.

evaluation_criteria.name: Resolution Attempted
evaluation_criteria.description: The agent made a genuine attempt to resolve the issue or escalated appropriately.

evaluation_criteria.name: Professional Tone
evaluation_criteria.description: The agent maintained a professional, empathetic, and helpful tone throughout the conversation.

issue_category.description: Category of the issue: billing, technical, shipping, account, product, other

issue_description.description: A concise summary of the customer's issue

sentiment.description: Customer's overall sentiment during the call
